topics.title: Artie's Health and Weight Concerns
topics.summary: The studio discusses Artie's recent medical checkup, his weight gain, and the potential impact of medication on his health while reacting to listener feedback regarding his habits.

topics.title: Music Samples and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The studio features a series of musical performances, discussions on hip-hop culture, and commentary regarding media monopolies and conspiracy theories.

topics.title: Media Rankings and Satirical News
topics.summary: The studio discusses a poll regarding trust in babysitters, the success of satellite radio ratings, various satirical news stories from thespoof.com, and a prank call featuring Hank the Dwarf.

topics.title: Retail Promotion and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The show discusses a furniture store's promotion tied to the Red Sox, reports on a celebrity's public behavior at an auction, and features a segment involving a mock exorcism.

topics.title: Nick Manning's Career and Personal Life
topics.summary: The studio features Nick Manning, a porn star with a master's degree, as he discusses his film career, upcoming projects, and personal grooming routines.

topics.title: Nick Manning's Real Estate and Celebrity Clients
topics.summary: The studio explores Nick Manning's real estate holdings, his professional interactions with high-profile celebrities, and the logistics of his adult film career.

topics.title: The Bleeding Deacons Musical Performance
topics.summary: The studio hosts the rock band The Bleeding Deacons to discuss their musical career, their production of various comedy songs based on show segments, and their specific performances regarding Robin.

topics.title: Bleeding Deacons and Yucco Clown Performance
topics.summary: The studio features the musical group Bleeding Deacons and clown Yucco, discussing upcoming performances, a prank call involving a massage therapist, and personal anecdotes regarding marriage and career changes.

topics.title: Yucco the Clown and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio features Yucco the Clown discussing his engagement, a series of offensive comedy bits from past shows, and celebrity rumors with gossip columnist Mike Walker.

topics.title: Celebrity Gossip and Legal News
topics.summary: The show covers various celebrity stories including a wardrobe mishap on Dancing with the Stars, a contract dispute over a film starring Jackie Markling, and a legal case involving an alienation of affection lawsuit in Mississippi.

topics.title: Staff Departure and Celebrity Commentary
topics.summary: The studio features a staff member announcing his move to a production company in Georgia, followed by discussions regarding celebrity legal settlements, public image, and personal claims about virginity.

topics.title: Hostile Exchange and Celebrity Rankings
topics.summary: The studio features a heated argument regarding personal habits and accusations of dishonesty before transitioning into a discussion on celebrity attractiveness and the current state of California wildfires.

topics.title: Celebrity Analysis and Entertainment News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the physical appearance of various celebrities, current music charts featuring Bruce Springsteen and Carrie Underwood, upcoming comedy tours, and recent news regarding OJ Simpson and Britney Spears.
